title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
full_text:
Safety Notice:
 Safehemo is a Pre-Alpha Demonstration. It is NOT a medical device and does not connect to emergency services. In an emergency, call 911 immediately.
 
 Learn more
 
 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 We can't find the internet
 
 

 Attempting to reconnect
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 Something went wrong!
 
 

 Hang in there while we get back on track
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 Home dialysis offers freedom, but the isolation can be risky. Ankaa bridges the gap between patient independence and clinical
 safety.
 
 

 We connect Patients, Clinics, and Communities into a
 single, secure ecosystem. From real-time simulations to clinical rosters, everyone stays in the loop.
 
 * Automated EMS calls disabled in Preview
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

Core Platform Features
 

 We are building the operating system for modern home dialysis. Here is what is live in the Pre-Alpha preview.
 
 

 

 

 
 

Patient Hub
 

 The central command center for the patient. Invite family, friends, and doctors to join your secure circle and
 view your realtime status.
 
 

 

 
 

Clinical Workspace
 

 A dedicated dashboard for Clinics. Doctors and Nurses can view a Roster of all their
 patients, tracking adherence and active alerts in one view.
 
 

 

 
 

Community Hubs
 

 Connect with your local clinic or support group. Access pinned resources, announcements, and educational
 content curated by your care team.
 
 

 

 
 

Instant Alerts
 

 Automated detection of critical events (like low BP or leak detection) triggers immediate notifications to
 your entire Care Network.
 
 

 

 
 

Device Simulation
 

 Includes a Mock IoT Server to simulate real-world dialysis data streams, allowing you to test the safety
 pipeline without connecting physical hardware.
 
 

 

 
 

Health Tracking
 

 Continuous monitoring of simulated vital signs. We track trends over time to help providers optimize treatment
 plans before emergencies happen.
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

How It Works
 

 Join the ecosystem in three simple steps.
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Choose Your Role
 

 Are you a Patient needing a safety net? Or a Doctor starting a clinic?
 Create an account and select the workspace that fits your needs.
 
 
 

 
 Sign up with Email and Secure Password
 
 

 
 Accept HIPAA Compliance Terms
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 

 

Build Your Network
 

 If you are a Patient, invite your family and doctors. If you are a Clinic, create your organization and
 invite patients to your Roster.
 
 
 

 
 Granular permission controls (Owner, Admin, Viewer)
 
 

 
 Instant invites via email
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

Start The Simulation
 

 Connect the Mock IoT Device to see data stream into your dashboard. Watch as alerts trigger real-time
 updates across the entire network.
 
 
 

 
 Real-time charts and status updates
 
 

 
 Test the "First Responder" alert pipeline
 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 Safehemo
 
 

 Building the open-source digital safety net for home hemodialysis patients.
 
 Pre-Alpha v0.1
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

Support
 

 This project is maintained by volunteers. Your support helps keep the servers running.
 
 
 
 
 
 Buy me a Coffee
 
 
 

 

 

 

© 2026 Safehemo / Qwelian Tanner. Open Source under BUSL License.
 

 DISCLAIMER: This application is for educational and simulation
 purposes only. It is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice. In an emergency, dial 911.
